text.heading: DEPARTMENT OF ECONOMICS
FACULTY OF SOCIAL SCIENCES
Minutes of Departmental Review Meeting held on Friday 19th February, 2010
1. Membership
text.p:
Dr.
Ag. HOD, Chairman
abs absent Prof.

+ Annual Leave Prof. (Mrs)

In Attendance - Mr.
took the minutes
text.heading: 2. Opening Prayer
text.p:
The meeting started with an opening prayer said by Prof.
at exactly 10.24 a.m.
text.heading: 3. Welcome Address:
text.p:
The Chairman, Dr.
welcomed members to the meeting. He thanked them for their unflinching supports to see that the Department moves forward. He then highlighted the matters slated for the day's deliberation as follows:
a. 2008/2009 Review Exercise
b. 2008/2009 Rain Semester Examination Marking and Submission of Results
c. A Letter from EFC on the ECN 310 Result of 961477
d. AOB
text.heading: A. 2008/2009 Review Exercise
text.p: The meeting considered the Curriculum Vitaes of members and deliberated cases as follows:
text.heading: I. CASES OD PROMOTION
text.p:
The Departmental Review Panel considered the two CVs submitted for review respect of Dr.
and Mr.
and deliberated as follows:
text.heading: i. Dr. - Promotion from the post of Lecturer I to Senior Lecturer
text.p: The meeting noted and observed from the CV submitted that Dr. had more publications to his credit after his last promotion (October, 2002). It also noted that he had acquired his Ph.D. degree since 2005 and he has thus satisfied the number of years required for promotion. It is the view of the panel that Dr. would have been recommended for promotion since three years ago but for the fact of the University's decision not to promote staff on Sabbatical Leave.

Now that Dr. had just resumed from his Sabbatical and Accumulated leave, and based on the fact that he had been performing his duties excellently, the Review Panel recommended that he be promoted from the post of Lecturer I to the post of Senior Lecturer with effect from 1st October, 2009.
text.heading: ii. Mr. - Promotion from the post of Lecturer I to Senior Lecturer
text.p: The meeting noted and also observed from the CV submitted that Mr. had had an additional four publications to his credit after his last promotion. It also noted that he had acquired his M.Phil degree and he's preparing for his Ph.D Qualifying examination and that he has satisfied the three years minimum requirement for promotion.

Based on the fact that Mr. had been performing his duties excellently the Review Panel recommended that he be promoted from the post of Lecturer I to the post of Senior Lecturer with effect from 1st October, 2009.
text.heading: II. CASES FOR NORMAL ANNUAL INCREMENT
text.p: Having carefully studied all the CV's submitted, the following observations were made:
ii. Majority of the staffs are on their Ph.D programmes at one level or the other and that they are all making steady progresses in the programmes.
iii. Some CVs does not give complete information in the area of publications.
v. That some members did not even submit their CV's for review.
After an extensive deliberations on each of them, the Departmental Review panel made the following recommendations:
i. Those who had some corrections to make on their CVs should do so and forwarded the corrected CVs to the Departmental office for further necessary action.
ii. That staff should always ensure that their publications are published in reputable local and international journals.
iii. That those on Ph.D programmes should speed up action as the passing of it is a key criteria to move from one level to the other.

iv. That members of staff who did not submittheir CV's for review because of the erroneous belief that they were not due either for promotion or confirmation of appointment should submit their CV's for record purposes.

v. The Departmental Review Panel then, having noted all the staff are making steady progress in their Ph.D programmes and are performing excellently well in the areas of teaching and services within and outside the University then recommended that the following staff be given their normal increment within the current review year since they are not yet due for either confirmation of appointment or promotion.

Dr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Dr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Dr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Dr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Mr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment

Mr.
Recommended for Normal Annual Increment
text.heading: III. APPLICATION FOR SABBATICAL LEAVE - Dr. XXX
text.p:
The Review Panel considered the application for sabbatical leave submitted by Dr. . The panel also noted that Dr.
had resumed duty after his accumulated leave and that only three members of staff are on accumulated leave viz: Prof. (Mrs.)
, Prof. (Mrs.)
and Dr.
. The Panel was also informed that Dr. had promised to always make himself available for the supervision of postgraduate students under him while on sabbatical leave. The Review Panel then recommended that the application for sabbatical leave of Dr.
be recommended to the Faculty Review Panel for approval. The date of the Sabbatical Leave is 1st March, 2010.
text.heading: 5. Adjournment
text.p: The meeting adjourned at exactly 3.30pm after a prayer said by Mr.
Chairman's Signature Date: 23/2/2010
